tagline: Paper marbling supplies for bookbinders and stationery makers

collections.name: Starter marbling kits
collections.description: First tray, bookbinder endpaper, classroom-safe, and weekend stationery kits for clear buying paths.

collections.name: Surface and chemistry goods
collections.description: Carrageenan or methylcellulose sizing, alum, dispersant, ox gall alternatives, pH strips, and measuring scoops.

collections.name: Color materials
collections.description: Marbling pigments, ink droppers, color-story sets, metallic accents, and test swatch packs.

collections.name: Tools and workspace
collections.description: Shallow trays, rakes, combs, styluses, rinse tubs, drying clips, aprons, gloves, and cleanup cloths.

collections.name: Paper and project bundles
collections.description: Cotton sheets, bookcloth pairings, card blanks, envelope packs, label sheets, pattern archive cards, and edition logbooks.

products.name: First Tray Marbling Kit
products.summary: Tray, starter sizing, alum, droppers, four pigments, test paper, stylus, and a bench checklist for the first pull.

products.name: Bookbinder Endpaper Kit
products.summary: Cotton endpaper sheets, alum, comb, rake, color notes, and edition log cards for matching covers and text blocks.

products.name: Classroom-Safe Kit
products.summary: Small-group trays, aprons, gloves, cleanup cloths, pH strips, methylcellulose sizing, and student swatch cards.

products.name: Carrageenan Sizing Jar
products.summary: Fine powder for traditional marbling baths with mixing notes sized for home and small studio trays.

products.name: Methylcellulose Studio Pack
products.summary: Classroom-friendly sizing option bundled with pH strips and a measuring scoop.

products.name: Alum Prep Bottle
products.summary: Paper-prep solution for cotton sheets, card blanks, envelopes, and label stock before pulling color.

products.name: Endpaper Classics Pigment Set
products.summary: Indigo, madder, moss, and warm black pigments with matching test swatch cards.

products.name: Weekend Stationery Color Story
products.summary: Soft rose, brass accent, teal, and parchment tones for cards, envelopes, and place cards.

products.name: Shallow Studio Tray
products.summary: A broad, shallow tray sized for endpaper sheets, card blanks, and small art prints.

products.name: Rake and Comb Pair
products.summary: Two pattern tools for peacock lines, gel-git spacing, and repeatable combed pulls.

products.name: Cotton Pull Pack
products.summary: Twenty-five cotton sheets pre-sized for endpapers, prints, and cover panels.

products.name: Card and Envelope Blank Set
products.summary: Folded card blanks and matching envelopes for weekend stationery projects and gift buyers.

products.name: Pattern Archive Cards
products.summary: Sample cards and edition logbook pages for recording pigments, bath age, paper, and rake pattern.
